channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'I'll listen to 'Only the Young' at home on my own': Zohran doesn't know about a Swift-Kelce wedding at MSG, but he's not going
item.description: The AP could not confirm the Times report that it's at Madison Square Garden, but no public events are planned from June 29 through July 7.

item.title: The end of Putin's regime will spring from war spending chaos, former central bank advisor says, amid military mutiny threat and fuel-shortage brawls
item.description: 'It's less dramatic than a palace coup, but this is what decline looks like.'

item.title: The 2 billion-print, $2-pack last hurrah for a World Cup legend: the Panini sticker album's last ride
item.description: Madrid newsstands ration two per customer. A collector spent 7 hours and 47 minutes filling one album. Fanatics takes over after 2030.

item.title: Australia to strengthen enforcement of under-16 social media ban
item.description: It is clear that big tech companies are not doing enough to comply with the law, as many children remain on social media.
